headline: Target (TGT) Turnaround Efforts Showing Early Progress, Says RBC Capital
summary: Target Corporation (NYSE:TGT) is included among the 10 Best Inflation-Hedge Stocks to Buy for 2026. On May 8, RBC Capital analyst Steven Shemesh raised the firm’s price recommendation on Target Corporation (NYSE:TGT) to $132 from $130. It reiterated an Outperform rating on the shares ahead of the company’s Q1 results. The analyst said the firm […]
